englishDefinitions: A playful or euphemistic term sometimes used to refer to male genitalia or sexual activity.
persianTranslation: اصطلاح شوخی‌آمیز برای آلت تناسلی مرد
examples: He laughed and used 'bing a ling' as a joke.
The term 'bing a ling' appears in some old slang songs.
She didn't understand what he meant by 'bing a ling.'
